reviews.review_title: good demo but wondering for full game
reviews.review_description: if i played this lite free one when i buy the full game will it save all my progress.
Invite for discord link did not work, feel free to help devs, would like to try

Shows promise but does not feel fully cooked. I like the visuals but the sound really feels low budget, making the whole thing feel cheap. 

Basically, most things don't make a noise at all, and the rest are largely unsatisfying. Explosions are silent or very quiet, you will find a visceral visual as you slice something off, but there is no satisfying splatch sound to match. Enemies flailing toward you make no noise at all, and when they hit you you barely notice. Guns are pretty unsatisfying, and all weapons have no feeling of weight.

Anyway, I was interested to find new guns etc but got bored pretty quick.
Best game ever it is a bit annoying because of the full release now the free version has it gone too lite which is a bit annoying till then me and my friend has to save up for the actual game ￼

developer_response.body: You just need to join the Discord and enter the code that is posted in there. It's very simple I assure you.

reviews.review_description: It’s a amazing game but there is one problem all the important items you need to progress sum time fall through the floor same with weapons and there get stuck in walls
Only week 6 code works and you can’t play anything except for mini games, and when you try to watch the tutorial you just stand on a boat forever.

developer_response.body:
We change the code each week along with the maps and weapons you can use. I just want to clarify that this is an early access play test and not a full game, which is why the content available changes each week.

However you are incorrect about only including mini games. Each playtest features 2 full maps alongside a mini game. If you join the Discord you will see players that have been playing these maps each week and sharing their feedback on them.

And finally the tutorial bug has been fixed, my apologies for that. But again, this is an early access title and some bugs are to be expected.
